---
description: Decompose a multi-step task, run the restraint ladder, route through specialist skills.
agent: agent
argument-hint: <multi-step task>
---

Use the `conductor` skill to orchestrate: ${input}

Decompose the task, apply the restraint ladder, and route each sub-task through the appropriate specialist skills. Gate each stage before proceeding.

Output: the orchestrated result plus a short trace of which stages ran and which skills were routed to.
